lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਧੰਨੁ ਕਹਹੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਜਿਤੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਹਰਿ ਪੜਦਾ ਕਜਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sabh dhan kahahu gur satiguroo gur satiguroo jit mil har parradaa kajiaa |7|
lines.english: Let everyone proclaim: Blessed is the Guru, the True Guru, the Guru, the True Guru; meeting Him, the Lord covers their faults and deficiencies. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਸਰੋਵਰੁ ਉਛਲੈ ਸੁਭਰ ਭਰੇ ਵਹੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat sarovar uchhalai subhar bhare vahan |
lines.english: The sacred pool of devotional worship is filled to the brim and overflowing in torrents.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Salok, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮੰਨਿਆ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਵਡਭਾਗ ਲਹੰਨਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jinaa satigur maniaa jan naanak vaddabhaag lahan |1|
lines.english: Those who obey the True Guru, O servant Nanak, are very fortunate - they find it. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਅਸੰਖ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਨ ਕਥਨੁ ਨ ਜਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam asankh har har ke gun kathan na jaeh |
lines.english: The Names of the Lord, Har, Har, are countless. The Glorious Virtues of the Lord, Har, Har, cannot be described.

lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਅਗਮੁ ਅਗਾਧਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਕਿਤੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਮਿਲਹਿ ਮਿਲਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: har har agam agaadh har jan kit bidh mileh milaeh |
lines.english: The Lord, Har, Har, is Inaccessible and Unfathomable; how can the humble servants of the Lord be united in His Union?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਜਪਤ ਜਪੰਤ ਜਨ ਇਕੁ ਤਿਲੁ ਨਹੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har har jas japat japant jan ik til nahee keemat paae |
lines.english: Those humble beings meditate and chant the Praises of the Lord, Har, Har, but they do not attain even a tiny bit of His Worth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਅਗਮ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਹਰਿ ਮੇਲਿ ਲੈਹੁ ਲੜਿ ਲਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak har agam prabh har mel laihu larr laae |2|
lines.english: O servant Nanak, the Lord God is Inaccessible; the Lord has attached me to His Robe, and united me in His Union. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਛੁ ਵਖਰੁ ਹੋਇ ਸੁ ਵਰਨੀਐ ਤਿਸੁ ਰੂਪੁ ਨ ਰਿਖਾ ॥
lines.translit: kichh vakhar hoe su varaneeai tis roop na rikhaa |
lines.english: If He were a material object, then I could describe Him, but He has no form or feature.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਅਗਮੁ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਅਗਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਕਿਉ ਕਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਪਿਖਾ ॥
lines.translit: har agam agochar agam har kiau kar har darasan pikhaa |
lines.english: The Lord is Inaccessible and Unfathomable. How will I see the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਬੁਝਾਏ ਆਪਿ ਬੁਝਾਇ ਦੇਇ ਸੋਈ ਜਨੁ ਦਿਖਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis bujhaae aap bujhaae dee soee jan dikhaa |
lines.english: Understanding comes only when the Lord Himself gives understanding; only such a humble being sees it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਚਟਸਾਲ ਹੈ ਜਿਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਸਿਖਾ ॥
lines.translit: satasangat satigur chattasaal hai jit har gun sikhaa |
lines.english: The Sat Sangat, the True Congregation of the True Guru, is the school of the soul, where the Glorious Virtues of the Lord are studied.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਧੰਨੁ ਸੁ ਰਸਨਾ ਧੰਨੁ ਕਰ ਧੰਨੁ ਸੁ ਪਾਧਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਜਿਤੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਹਰਿ ਲੇਖਾ ਲਿਖਾ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: dhan dhan su rasanaa dhan kar dhan su paadhaa satiguroo jit mil har lekhaa likhaa |8|
lines.english: Blessed, blessed is the tongue, blessed is the hand, and blessed is the Teacher, the True Guru; meeting Him, the Account of the Lord is written. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਵਿਤੁ ਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਤ ਸੁਨਤ ਦੁਖੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam pavit hai har japat sunat dukh jaae |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord, Har, Har is Sacred and Pure. Chanting it and listening to it, pain is taken away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਜਪੀਐ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam amrit hai har japeeai satigur bhaae |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord, Har, Har, is Ambrosial Nectar. Meditate on the Lord, with love for the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Salok, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਤਿਨੀ ਆਰਾਧਿਆ ਜਿਨ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਧੁਰਿ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har naam tinee aaraadhiaa jin masatak likhiaa dhur paae |
lines.english: They alone worship and adore the Lord's Name, upon whose foreheads such pre-ordained destiny is written.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਜਨ ਪੈਨਾਈਅਨਿ ਜਿਨ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: har daragah jan painaaeean jin har man vasiaa aae |
lines.english: Those humble beings are honored in the Court of the Lord; the Lord comes to abide in their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਤੇ ਮੁਖ ਉਜਲੇ ਜਿਨ ਹਰਿ ਸੁਣਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jan naanak te mukh ujale jin har suniaa man bhaae |1|
lines.english: O servant Nanak, their faces are radiant. They listen to the Lord; their minds are filled with love. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam nidhaan hai guramukh paaeaa jaae |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord, Har, Har, is the greatest treasure. The Gurmukhs obtain it.

lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਧੁਰਿ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: jin dhur masatak likhiaa tin satigur miliaa aae |
lines.english: The True Guru comes to meet those who have such pre-ordained destiny written upon their foreheads.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਹੋਇਆ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਵਸੀ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: tan man seetal hoeaa saant vasee man aae |
lines.english: Their bodies and minds are cooled and soothed; peace and tranquility come to dwell in their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਚਉਦਿਆ ਸਭੁ ਦਾਲਦੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਲਹਿ ਜਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak har har chaudiaa sabh daalad dukh leh jaae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, chanting the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, all poverty and pain is dispelled. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਜਿਨਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਦੇਖਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaariaa tin kau sadaa sadaa jinaa satigur meraa piaaraa dekhiaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, forever and ever, to those who have seen my Beloved True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਮੇਰਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਧੁਰਿ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲੇਖਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: tin kau miliaa meraa satiguroo jin kau dhur masatak lekhiaa |
lines.english: They alone meet my True Guru, who have such pre-ordaind destiny written upon their foreheads.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਅਗਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਤਿਸੁ ਰੂਪੁ ਨਹੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਰੇਖਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: har agam dhiaaeaa guramatee tis roop nahee prabh rekhiaa |
lines.english: I meditate on the Inaccessible Lord, according to the Guru's Teachings; God has no form or feature.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨਿ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਜਿਨਾ ਅਗਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਤੇ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਸੇਵਕ ਰਲਿ ਏਕਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur bachan dhiaaeaa jinaa agam har te tthaakur sevak ral ekiaa |
lines.english: Those who follow the Guru's Teachings and meditate on the Inaccessible Lord, merge with their Lord and Master and become one with Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਕਹਹੁ ਮੁਖਹੁ ਨਰ ਨਰਹਰੇ ਨਰ ਨਰਹਰੇ ਨਰ ਨਰਹਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਲਾਹਾ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਵਿਸੇਖਿਆ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: sabh kahahu mukhahu nar narahare nar narahare nar narahare har laahaa har bhagat visekhiaa |9|
lines.english: Let everyone proclaim out loud, the Name of the Lord, the Lord, the Lord; the profit of devotional worship of the Lord is blessed and sublime. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਮੁ ਰਵਿ ਰਹੇ ਰਮੁ ਰਾਮੋ ਰਾਮੁ ਰਮੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam ram rav rahe ram raamo raam rameet |
lines.english: The Lord's Name is permeating and pervading all. Repeat the Name of the Lord, Raam, Raam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Salok, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਆਤਮ ਰਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਖੇਲੁ ਕੀਓ ਰੰਗਿ ਰੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt aatam raam hai prabh khel keeo rang reet |
lines.english: The Lord is in the home of each and every soul. God created this play with its various colors and forms.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਿਕਟਿ ਵਸੈ ਜਗਜੀਵਨਾ ਪਰਗਾਸੁ ਕੀਓ ਗੁਰ ਮੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: har nikatt vasai jagajeevanaa paragaas keeo gur meet |
lines.english: The Lord, the Life of the World, dwells near at hand. The Guru, my Friend, has made this clear.
